title: Origins: Apparition
description: An origin that is bones no skin
body:
**Apparition** (Impact 2 Origin)

# THIS PROJECT IS DISCONTINUED.
### and therefore will not recieve updates in the upcoming months.
_Undead, rotted corpses thats skeletons are fragile enough to pass through walls smoothly._

**Spectral Skeleton**

When sprinting you are able to weaken your skeleton enough to pass through walls, you become slightly transparent and give off particles when sprinting as well.

 - You can phase down when sneaking whilst sprinting.

 - Holding jump while phasing allows you to float to the top.

**Blood Clot**

Occasionally, you can prevent an attack from taking place though this exhausts you greatly.

**Twisted Biology**

You cannot naturally regenerate or benefit from potions that would regen you, instead when out of combat you rapidly heal.

**Disconnected**

Your bones are so weak that you cannot pack much of a punch, you have 7 hearts and you take 10% more damage than usual, wearing armor makes you take 20%.

**Smooth Footed**

When not sneaking or sprinting you slide across the floor whenever you move, the ground acting like ice.

- You're immune to fall damage.

**Exhausting**

You exhaust more when sprinting than usual.

**(C)** _**Credits**_

Version: 1.2

Creator: **orrchid**
